demo.title: hunch-bet.sh
demo.code:
# Discover markets from a token or phrase
curl -s "https://www.playhunch.xyz/api/partner/discover?q=$BNKR"

# Quote a side and size before betting
curl -s "https://www.playhunch.xyz/api/partner/quote?marketId=bankr-100m-mcap-2026-06-30&side=yes&sizeUsd=5"

# Place a bet (x402 flow: initial 402 challenge, then resubmit with X-PAYMENT)
curl -s -X POST "https://www.playhunch.xyz/api/partner/trade"   -H "Content-Type: application/json"   -d '{"marketId":"bankr-100m-mcap-2026-06-30","side":"yes","sizeUsd":5,"walletAddress":"0xYourWallet","idemKey":"<uuid>"}'

setup: Use Base wallet + USDC; bets are constrained to `$1-$10` per trade
Trade with idempotency key and x402 payment header via `POST /api/partner/trade`
